required_followups: Create docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s07 closeout evidence so npm run rp00:control-plane:validate passes; this is the normal post-review closeout step, not a code defect.
review_notes: Scope is respected: the only executable behavior is precheckControlPlaneHermesValidationPrimaryHappyPath, a pure function with no I/O, no Hermes execution, no audit/ledger writes, and no product-state mutation.
Defense-in-depth on claims rejects every forbidden claim by name and rejects unknown truthy claims.

Input integrity rejects non-object/array input, non-hermes_validation entrypoint, non-S06 marker, denied audit_hint_decision, unsatisfied audit_event_ref, and re-runs assertControlPlaneHermesValidationAuditHintPrecheckResult.
Contract/fixture/module parity is independently enforced by validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs and service tests, including firm-level null Matter handling and rejection scenarios.
parsed_review.summary: RP00.P02.M03.S07 correctly implements a deterministic, metadata-only Hermes Validation Primary happy path that consumes the S06 audit hint precheck result, emits a frozen receipt, preserves every required carry-forward, and hands off to S08. All prohibited actions are enforced via hard-coded false flags plus fail-closed rejection of truthy claims. Policy/result/prechecker/fixture/contract are mutually consistent and thoroughly tested. No P0/P1/P2 findings.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS with no findings; only required follow-up was normal S07 closeout evidence creation.
